title: 'Reading the tea leaves': When will the Trump trial end? Here's what to know

title: Why is Biden heading to Boston and New Hampshire?
shortDescription: Biden is traveling to Boston and New Hampshire today to announce more benefits and services for veterans exposed to burn pits.

title: June 27 Biden-Trump debate is in Atlanta. Here's why that matters.
shortDescription: Trump and Biden will debate in Atlanta, the epicenter of political drama for the candidates.

title: Amid criminal trial, Trump holds rally in the 'South, South Bronx'
shortDescription: Former president Donald Trump announced he will host a rally in the South Bronx Thursday. Democrats said they will host a counter demonstration.

title: Blinken defends Biden on Israel as protesters interrupt hearing
shortDescription: Secretary of State Antony Blinken defended President Joe Biden's stance on Israel during a Senate hearing that touched on the humanitarian crisis in Gaza.

title: Door knocking in the heat: What it's like registering NC Latino voters
shortDescription: Hoping to get more Latinos in North Carolina to head to the polls, Jackie Ramirez and her team, are working to register eligible voters.

title: Trump tops Biden in monthly fundraising for first time of 2024 race
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump outraised President Joe Biden in fundraising in April, but the Democratic incumbent still has a sizable cash edge.

shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump is identified as an unindicted co-conspirator in the Arizona election case.

title: Trump trial: Fiery exchange with Trump witness Costello | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: WikiLeaks founder Julian Assange has won an appeal to fight extradition to the U.S. | Arrest warrants request for Netanyahu, Sinwar and others.

title: 'Contemptuous' conduct leads to heated exchange at Trump trial. Read it

shortDescription: Judge Juan Merchan cleared the courtroom Monday to confront a key defense witness for breach of courtroom decorum. Read the transcript here.

title: Trump Truth Social post referencing 'unified reich' draws backlash
shortDescription: A video shared to Trump’s Truth Social account included a reference to a 'unified reich' while featuring what he would do if he won a second term.

title: Trump criticizes hush money judge

title: Biden administration proposes end to coal leases in Powder River Basin
shortDescription: One of Wyoming's top coal producing sites, the Powder River Basin, will no longer be leased after 2041, causing outrage among GOP lawmakers

title: Kentucky's primary election is Tuesday. Here's what you should know.
shortDescription: Kentucky voters head to the polls on Tuesday to vote in the presidential, U.S. House and state legislative primaries.

title: The Obamas outperform celebrity peers in election influence
shortDescription: In a new poll from USA TODAY and Suffolk University, it turns out the traditional "celebrity endorsement" may not help politicians this year.

title: Why was there a DRC flag behind Biden during his Morehouse speech?
shortDescription: An alleged coup in the DRC was taking place while Biden delivered his commencement address at Morehouse College.
